canonical_definition: Multi-domain challenge benchmark for word sense disambiguation that spans 42 domains aligned with BabelNet, designed to test generalization across diverse topics.
papers: Context Reasoner: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability for Contextualized Privacy and Safety Compliance via Reinforcement Learning
MicroEdit: Neuron-level Knowledge Disentanglement and Localization in Lifelong Model Editing

relationships.evidence: General-domain test sets: includes 42D and HardEN. These sets are designed to challenge models in diverse, unfamiliar, or out-of-distribution contexts. (Section 4.1)
